opening_sequence.title: Welcome to the Frontline, Mayor
opening_sequence.intro: The city is rebuilding from decades of war, but Al-Shabaab still lurks in the shadows. International aid is siphoned off, clans demand their cut, and surviving the term is an achievement in itself.

advisors.name: Abdirahman Warsame
advisors.hidden_agenda: Diverting international reconstruction funds to foreign accounts.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Implementing an independent UN-backed audit of all municipal finances.

briefing: The World Bank grant just cleared.
Tax collection at the port is down 30% due to 'leakage'.
We have no money for basic salaries this month.
agreement: A profitable decision.
The donors will be satisfied.
disagreement: You are cutting off our oxygen.
This makes us look incompetent to the West.
dialogue.betrayal: You wanted transparency? Enjoy your empty treasury. I'm taking my share to Dubai.
roast: You run this city like a charity with no donors.
I've seen warlords with better financial sense.
scandal_reaction: Deny it and blame foreign interference.
I need to hide some files.

advisors.name: Hawa Elmi
advisors.hidden_agenda: Channeling diaspora remittances into formal municipal bonds instead of unregulated hawala networks.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Bypassing the central bank to accept untraceable cash injections from foreign NGOs.

briefing: Diaspora remittances hit $2 billion last year, but zero cents reach the municipal ledger.
The hawala operators are resisting our new digital tax reporting mandates.
We can issue municipal reconstruction bonds, but only if we guarantee transparency.
agreement: Finally, a policy that builds real institutional trust.
I will draft the diaspora outreach campaign immediately.
disagreement: This is the only path to a sustainable budget.
You are empowering the same shadow networks that fund the insurgency.
dialogue.betrayal: You chose dark money over legitimate state-building. I am resigning and taking the diaspora coalition with me.
roast: You treat the national currency like a suggestion.
Your financial strategy is just legalized looting.
scandal_reaction: I will publish the full forensic audit. The truth will come out.
The international community needs to see these ledgers.

advisors.name: Colonel Hassan Jama
advisors.hidden_agenda: Securing arms deals for his sub-clan's militia under the guise of municipal police.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Disarming unauthorized clan militias within city limits.

briefing: VBIED threat level is extremely high today.
We need more armored vehicles for the checkpoints.
The insurgents are taxing businesses in the outskirts.
agreement: Strength is the only language they understand.
Good. More guns on the street.
disagreement: You are inviting an attack.
Weakness will get us all killed.
dialogue.betrayal: You disarmed my people. We will not protect you when they come for you.
roast: You would surrender to a strong breeze.
Your security plan is a suicide note.
scandal_reaction: Increase my security detail immediately.
This will embolden the enemy.

advisors.name: Major Amina Yusuf
advisors.hidden_agenda: Building a centralized, clan-neutral intelligence unit to root out sleeper cells, bypassing traditional clan elders.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Appointing a known clan militia leader to a senior municipal security position.

briefing: Our human intelligence network indicates a planned disruption near the airport.
Police recruitment must be merit-based, not quota-based, or we infiltrate ourselves.
The insurgents are exploiting clan grievances to recruit. We must counter-narrate.
agreement: Professionalism will save this city.
I will deploy the intelligence unit quietly.
disagreement: You are politicizing the security forces. That is fatal.
Clan loyalty is a liability in counter-terrorism.
dialogue.betrayal: You appointed a warlord to command our streets. I am taking my intelligence files to the Federal Government.
roast: You mistake brute force for strategy.
Your security apparatus is a revolving door for criminals.
scandal_reaction: I will secure the evidence before it is destroyed.
We must handle this internally, or the insurgents will exploit the division.

advisors.name: Fadumo Ali
advisors.hidden_agenda: Resettling internally displaced persons (IDPs) into prime real estate areas.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Bulldozing an IDP camp to build a luxury hotel for diaspora investors.

briefing: Another 5,000 IDPs arrived from the drought regions.
Diaspora investors want land that is currently occupied by refugees.
We need to restore the ruined Italian-era buildings.
agreement: Finally, building for the people.
A step towards a modern capital.
disagreement: You only build for the rich.
The poor are not invisible.
dialogue.betrayal: You destroyed their only refuge for a hotel. I'm organizing the camps against you.
roast: You govern over ruins and call it progress.
Your legacy is just more rubble.
scandal_reaction: Shameful. Absolutely shameful.
I cannot defend this.

advisors.name: Eng. Mohamed 'Mo' Hassan
advisors.hidden_agenda: Fast-tracking a massive, diaspora-funded commercial district that requires clearing informal settlements.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Halting all private construction permits to conduct a 6-month environmental and social impact review.

briefing: Rubble clearance in Hodan is 80% complete. We can break ground on the new commercial zone.
Diaspora investors are ready to wire $50 million, but they need land titles guaranteed.
The port expansion requires rerouting the main coastal road. It will cause temporary disruption.
agreement: Progress at last. The city will rise.
I will expedite the permits tonight.
disagreement: Sentimentality is holding back reconstruction.
You cannot run a modern city on informal squatter rights.
dialogue.betrayal: You've stalled the capital with red tape. I'm taking the diaspora investors to Hargeisa.
roast: You're governing a graveyard and calling it a city.
Your vision is stuck in the past, while the world moves on.
scandal_reaction: The investors need reassurance, not apologies.
I will frame this as a necessary, temporary regulatory pause.

advisors.name: Omar 'Bajaaj' Farah
advisors.hidden_agenda: Maintaining a monopoly on the lucrative Bajaji (auto-rickshaw) import licenses.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Banning Bajaji rickshaws from major central roads.

briefing: Maka Al-Mukarama road is jammed with Bajajis.
The port requires dredging, cargo ships are turning away.
A checkpoint on the Afgooye road is demanding illegal tolls.
agreement: Things are moving, Boss.
The drivers are happy.
disagreement: You are paralyzing the city.
Don't blame me when the youth riot.
dialogue.betrayal: You cut off my drivers. The streets are closed to you now.
roast: This administration is stuck in neutral.
You couldn't manage a donkey cart.
scandal_reaction: I've got an armored car ready for you.
Time to lay low.

advisors.name: Captain Saed Ali
advisors.hidden_agenda: Securing exclusive customs contracts for a foreign logistics firm in exchange for kickbacks disguised as 'consulting fees'.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Nationalizing port customs operations or bringing in an international anti-corruption monitor.

briefing: Container dwell times at the port have doubled. We are losing regional cargo to Djibouti.
Customs revenue leakage is estimated at 40%. We need a private management partner.
The dredging contract is ready for signature. The foreign firm has excellent 'local knowledge'.
agreement: Efficient and profitable. A win for the port.
I will clear the customs bottleneck immediately.
disagreement: You are disrupting the supply chain with ideology.
State-run ports are a relic. We need private efficiency.
dialogue.betrayal: You brought in foreign auditors. My partners and I are withdrawing our 'logistical support'. Good luck moving cargo.
roast: You treat the port like a fishing village, not a national asset.
Your logistics strategy is a bottleneck of incompetence.
scandal_reaction: It's a misunderstanding of international maritime law.
I will have the legal team issue a strong denial.

advisors.name: Sheikh Ibrahim
advisors.hidden_agenda: Implementing strict religious codes at Lido Beach to ban mixed gatherings.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Sponsoring a major international music festival on the beach.

briefing: The youth are forgetting their faith.
We must mediate a clan dispute in the northern districts.
The insurgents are using distorted theology to recruit.
agreement: Alhamdulillah. A wise choice.
The elders will approve.
disagreement: You are leading the people astray.
This will bring ruin upon us.
dialogue.betrayal: You have turned this city into a den of sin. I have issued a fatwa against your administration.
roast: Your soul is as empty as the treasury.
You will face justice eventually.
scandal_reaction: May Allah forgive us.
This is a moral failing.

advisors.name: Dr. Aisha Osman
advisors.hidden_agenda: Redirecting madrasa funding to secular, state-approved civic education programs to counter extremist recruitment.
advisors.betrayal_trigger: Allocating municipal funds to build a new, unregulated religious school without curriculum oversight.

briefing: Youth unemployment in the IDP camps is creating fertile ground for extremist recruitment.
We need to integrate civic education into the madrasa curriculum to build resilience.
Moderate clerics are being sidelined by well-funded radical preachers.
agreement: This builds a resilient, educated generation.
I will coordinate with the moderate imams immediately.
disagreement: You are empowering the very ideologies that destroyed this city.
Ignoring curriculum oversight is a direct threat to national security.
dialogue.betrayal: You funded the extremists' pipeline. I will expose this to the international community and the moderate clerical council.
roast: You mistake silence for peace, and ignorance for piety.
Your policies are a gift to the insurgents.
scandal_reaction: This undermines years of moderate outreach.
I will publicly distance my office from this decision.

decisions.title: Culture Clash at Lido Beach
decisions.body: Lido Beach is the heart of Mogadishu's revival, but conservative clerics are demanding gender segregation and a ban on music.

options.label: Enforce strict segregation to appease the clerics.

consequences.public_reaction: Why are they taking away our only joy?

options.label: Refuse the ban and heavily police the beach to protect the youth.

consequences.public_reaction: We will not be intimidated. We want to live!

options.label: Privatize the beach to a foreign resort company, banning locals.

consequences.public_reaction: You stole our beach to sell to foreigners!

decisions.title: The Diaspora Returns
decisions.body: Wealthy Somalis returning from abroad are claiming prime ruined properties currently occupied by thousands of IDPs.

options.label: Halt evictions and prioritize the IDPs.

consequences.public_reaction: The poor have a right to the city too.

options.label: Evict the IDPs violently to make way for foreign investment.

consequences.public_reaction: Heartless. Where are they supposed to go?

options.label: Confiscate the land from the diaspora and sell it to local warlords.

consequences.public_reaction: Just feeding the lions so they don't eat us.

decisions.title: The Extortion Checkpoints
decisions.body: Unpaid police and local militias have set up dozens of illegal checkpoints, heavily taxing food entering the city.

options.label: Pay the militias a stipend from the municipal budget to stop.

consequences.public_reaction: It's bribery, but at least tomatoes are cheap again.

options.label: Send the federal military to clear the checkpoints by force.

consequences.public_reaction: Gunfire all night, but the roads are finally open.

options.label: Legalize the checkpoints and demand a 50% cut for the city.

consequences.public_reaction: The government is just the biggest gang in town.

decisions.title: Mountains of Garbage
decisions.body: There is no formal waste management. Massive piles of burning trash are causing severe respiratory illnesses across the districts.

options.label: Hire local youth groups for manual cleanup.

consequences.public_reaction: A small step, but we need real trucks.

options.label: Sign a massive contract with a Turkish waste management firm.

consequences.public_reaction: The Turks are cleaning our city. God bless them.

options.label: Designate an empty lot in a rival clan's territory as the official dump.

consequences.public_reaction: Are you trying to start a clan war over trash?!

decisions.title: The Port Revenues
decisions.body: The seaport is the main revenue generator, but massive corruption means only 20% of customs duties reach the treasury.

options.label: Install a digital tracking system to reduce theft.
Fire the corrupt port management and replace them with international monitors.

consequences.public_reaction: Finally taking our money back from the elites.

options.label: Hand complete control of the port over to a foreign mercenary group for a flat fee.

crises.name: Massive Bombing in Central District
crises.trigger: A massive truck bomb has detonated near a busy intersection, killing dozens and destroying infrastructure.
crises.description: The hospitals are overwhelmed. The public is furious at the lack of security. International aid workers are threatening to evacuate the city. We need an immediate response.

options.label: Divert all funds to emergency medical services and rebuilding.
Launch a brutal, indiscriminate security sweep of the suspected neighborhoods.
Downplay the attack on state media and pocket the international emergency aid.

crises.name: Militia Turf War Erupts
crises.trigger: Two rival sub-clans have started heavy fighting over control of a lucrative market district.
crises.description: Heavy weapons fire is echoing across the city. Civilians are trapped. The police refuse to intervene because they belong to the conflicting clans. The federal government is useless.

options.label: Beg the traditional elders to mediate a ceasefire.
Deploy the elite, foreign-trained anti-terror squad to crush both militias.
Secretly supply weapons to the weaker militia to prolong the fight and weaken both.

crises.name: World Bank Freezes Assets
crises.trigger: Citing massive, systemic corruption, international donors have frozen all municipal funding.
crises.description: We are completely broke. We cannot pay the police, the trash collectors, or the hospitals. Riots will start in 48 hours unless we find cash or convince the donors to return.

options.label: Submit to a humiliating, total takeover of city finances by foreign auditors.
Implement harsh emergency taxes on all businesses to survive independently.
Borrow millions from local warlords at extortionate interest rates.

crises.name: Insurgents Breach the Perimeter
crises.trigger: Al-Shabaab forces have launched a coordinated attack and breached the city's outer defenses.
crises.description: They are advancing on the municipal headquarters. The federal forces are retreating. You must make an existential choice for the city's survival.

options.label: Evacuate the government to the heavily fortified airport green zone.
Arm the citizenry and lead a desperate urban defense.
Flee the country on a private jet with the remaining treasury.

scandals.title: Mayor Implicated in Missing UN Food Aid
scandals.description: Tons of emergency food aid meant for IDP camps were found being sold for profit in markets owned by your relatives.

scandals.title: Salaries Paid to Non-Existent Police Battalion
scandals.description: International auditors discovered that an entire police unit you've been funding doesn't exist.

scandals.title: Secret Tax Agreement with Insurgents Leaked
scandals.description: Documents prove you've been paying a portion of municipal taxes directly to Al-Shabaab to prevent attacks on your properties.

positive: Finally, someone trying to build, not destroy.
The city feels a little safer today.
Hope is a dangerous thing, but I have some today.
neutral: Let's see if they steal the money first.
Only Allah knows what will happen tomorrow.
negative: They are selling our city to the highest bidder.
We are dying and they are getting rich.
media: Radio Mogadishu: New municipal directives announced today.
Somali National TV: Tensions rise over controversial city planning.
Garowe Online: Corruption allegations hit the Mayor's office.
Hiiraan Online: Citizens demand better security in the capital.
Local News: Traffic paralyzed on Maka Al-Mukarama.
Breaking: Heavy gunfire reported in the northern districts.
politician: This administration is a disaster for our people.
We demand a greater share for our district.
The federal government must step in.
We stand with the Mayor in these difficult times.
A courageous decision for the nation's capital.
activist: Protect the displaced! Stop the evictions!
We demand transparency in the aid money!
Peace cannot be built on injustice.
Clean water and medicine, not more weapons!
The youth are the future, stop ignoring us.
street: Waryaa, the Bajajis are crazy today.
Electricity is too expensive, we can't afford it.
Did you hear the explosion near KM4?
Prices at Bakaara market are too high.
They only care about themselves, saxiib.
Just trying to get home safely.
crisis: Running for cover, everyone stay safe.
Hospitals are full, we need help!
scandal: They are worse than the warlords.
We expected nothing and are still disappointed.

scandal_reactions.minor: Just another day of politicians eating.
scandal_reactions.moderate: They have no shame, stealing while we suffer.
scandal_reactions.major: This is an outrage! Return what was stolen!
scandal_reactions.career_ending: You have blood on your hands. Leave before the people come for you.

romance_exposure.flavour: In a deeply religious and clan-based society, such an illicit affair destroys all moral authority and invites violent retribution from the families involved.
